protocol: ENTERPRISE FORENSIC REPAIR & BOOTSTRAP RECOVERY PROTOCOL V12

sections.name: ROLES
sections.purpose: Defines the operational roles the AI must embody during execution
sections.completion_criteria: Roles acknowledged and applied throughout execution

sections.name: CORE_DIRECTIVE
sections.purpose: Defines the mission: investigate, verify, repair confirmed defects, preserve all features
sections.completion_criteria: All directives followed throughout protocol execution

sections.name: PRIMARY_OBJECTIVE
sections.purpose: Defines the required URLs and route verification requirements
sections.completion_criteria: All 12 listed URLs verified to return HTTP 200 with correct UI

sections.name: MANDATORY_INVESTIGATION_PHASE
sections.purpose: Requires generating PROJECT_FORENSIC_AUDIT_V2.md before any modification
sections.completion_criteria: PROJECT_FORENSIC_AUDIT_V2.md generated covering all sub-audits

sections.name: FRONTEND_AUDIT
sections.purpose: Full scan of frontend/src/**/* verifying router, pages, guards, API clients, stores
sections.completion_criteria: All 18 frontend components verified

sections.name: BACKEND_AUDIT
sections.purpose: Full scan of backend-api/src/**/* verifying routes, controllers, services, middleware
sections.completion_criteria: All 20 backend components verified

sections.name: FACE_AI_AUDIT
sections.purpose: Full scan of face-ai-service/**/* verifying face detection, MTCNN, FaceNet, liveness
sections.completion_criteria: All 14 face AI components verified

sections.name: DATABASE_AUDIT
sections.purpose: Verify tables, indexes, constraints, FKs, triggers, views, functions, migrations 001-018
sections.completion_criteria: All DB objects verified, migrations 001-018 confirmed applied

sections.name: DOCKER_AUDIT
sections.purpose: Verify docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.prod.yml, Dockerfiles, health checks, startup order
sections.completion_criteria: All Docker services verified healthy with correct dependency order

sections.name: NGINX_AUDIT
sections.purpose: Verify reverse proxy, route forwarding, HTTPS, API forwarding, SPA fallback
sections.completion_criteria: All nginx routes verified forwarding correctly

sections.name: BOOTSTRAP_RECOVERY_INVESTIGATION
sections.purpose: Determine why /setup/admin-face is unavailable, investigate all bootstrap/recovery paths
sections.completion_criteria: Root cause identified, BOOTSTRAP_ROOT_CAUSE_REPORT.md generated

sections.name: AUTHENTICATION_INVESTIGATION
sections.purpose: Validate Admin, Employee, Face, Password, Recovery, OTP, JWT, Refresh, Device Trust, Enrollment flows
sections.completion_criteria: All 11 auth flows validated, AUTH_FLOW_VALIDATION_REPORT.md generated

sections.name: FACE_PIPELINE_INVESTIGATION
sections.purpose: Validate camera capture through similarity matching for face registration and face login
sections.completion_criteria: All 12 face pipeline stages validated

sections.name: FACE_RECOGNITION_PIPELINE_HARDENING
sections.purpose: Verify complete face authentication pipeline: enrollment, persistence, mapping, restart survival
sections.completion_criteria: All 8 face recognition areas hardened and verified

sections.name: FACE_CAPTURE_OPTIMIZATION_INVESTIGATION
sections.purpose: Determine whether single-frame capture is sufficient vs multi-frame without reducing security
sections.completion_criteria: Frame count analysis complete, optimization decision documented

sections.name: GIT_CONFLICT_INVESTIGATION
sections.purpose: Audit 4 priority files for unresolved merge markers <<<<<<< ======= >>>>>>>
sections.completion_criteria: All 4 files scanned, no conflict markers remain

sections.name: ADDITIONAL_RECOMMENDATION_PRIORITY_INSPECTION
sections.purpose: Deep forensic inspection of BootstrapSetupPage.tsx, FaceLogin.tsx, auth/routes.js, main.py, migrations 017 & 018
sections.completion_criteria: All 6 priority files fully inspected and documented

sections.name: MANDATORY_CONFLICT_VALIDATION
sections.purpose: For each priority file, search for conflict markers and verify clean merge
sections.completion_criteria: Zero conflict markers found in all priority files

sections.name: PRE_REPAIR_EVIDENCE_CAPTURE
sections.purpose: Before any modification: capture system state, routes, APIs, DB schema, Docker, Redis state
sections.completion_criteria: All 6 evidence documents generated, stored in /forensic-evidence/<timestamp>/

sections.name: CHECKPOINT_SYSTEM
sections.purpose: Before ANY modification: create named checkpoint with file hashes, dependency graphs, rollback instructions
sections.completion_criteria: Checkpoint created with all 9 artifacts before any file is modified

sections.name: PERSISTENT_MISSION_CONTROL_SYSTEM
sections.purpose: Generate and maintain mission control files to survive context loss during extended execution
sections.completion_criteria: All 6 mission control files generated and continuously updated

sections.name: OBJECTIVE_TRACKING
sections.purpose: Convert every major protocol section into tracked objectives with NOT_STARTED/IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED/FAILED/BLOCKED status
sections.completion_criteria: All 19 listed objectives tracked with statuses

sections.name: REPAIR_PROGRESS_LEDGER
sections.purpose: Log every repair action with timestamp, file, reason, dependency impact, validation result, checkpoint reference
sections.completion_criteria: All repair actions logged in ledger

sections.name: COMPLIANCE_ENFORCEMENT
sections.purpose: Before every modification verify no forbidden action, no protected feature modified, no protected data removed
sections.completion_criteria: Compliance check passed before every modification

sections.name: ANTI_FORGETTING_LOOP
sections.purpose: Before every new phase, re-read mission control files and generate PHASE_RECONCILIATION_REPORT.md
sections.completion_criteria: Reconciliation performed before each phase transition

sections.name: API_CREDIT_EXHAUSTION_PROTECTION
sections.purpose: If execution stops, resume from last validated checkpoint rather than restarting
sections.completion_criteria: Resume protocol documented and ready to activate if needed

sections.name: FINAL_COMPLETION_GUARD
sections.purpose: Before declaring success verify PROTOCOL_SECTION_INDEX, MASTER_REQUIREMENT_REGISTRY, PROTOCOL_COVERAGE_MATRIX, FINAL_PROTOCOL_COMPLIANCE_AUDIT all show 100%
sections.completion_criteria: All deliverables generated, all objectives COMPLETED, certificate issued

sections.name: MASTER_PROTOCOL_INGESTION_AND_INTEGRITY_VERIFICATION
sections.purpose: Complete protocol ingestion in 5 phases: ingestion, extraction, coverage, re-verification, final audit
sections.completion_criteria: Coverage = 100%, all 5 phases complete

sections.name: SAFE_REPAIR_RULES
sections.purpose: Defines allowed and forbidden repair operations
sections.completion_criteria: Rules applied to every repair action

sections.name: VALIDATION_PHASE
sections.purpose: After every repair: route validation, API validation, face validation, database validation, Docker validation
sections.completion_criteria: All validations pass after every repair

sections.name: FINAL_ACCEPTANCE_TEST
sections.purpose: System passes only if all 30 listed acceptance criteria are met
sections.completion_criteria: All 30 acceptance criteria verified TRUE

sections.name: POST_REPAIR_DEPLOYMENT_AND_RESTART
sections.purpose: Create final backups, restart all services, re-run validations, confirm all URLs return HTTP 200
sections.completion_criteria: All containers healthy post-restart, all validations re-passed

sections.name: DATABASE_RESET_MODE
sections.purpose: Optional: Preserve Data Mode vs Fresh Installation Mode - only on explicit user request
sections.completion_criteria: Mode determined from user intent, no automatic destructive action

sections.name: DATABASE_PRESERVATION_AND_SELECTIVE_CLEANUP_POLICY
sections.purpose: Strictly forbid full wipes; define allowed vs forbidden cleanup operations
sections.completion_criteria: Protected data preserved, only allowed cleanup executed

sections.name: EMERGENCY_RESUME_PROTOCOL
sections.purpose: If execution stops: read manifests, locate latest checkpoint, verify integrity, resume from last checkpoint
sections.completion_criteria: Resume protocol tested and ready; execution continues from exact stopping point

sections.name: FINAL_SYSTEM_CERTIFICATION
sections.purpose: 12-step certification: verify URLs, containers, no merge markers, migrations, auth flows, face functions
sections.completion_criteria: All 12 certification checks pass

sections.name: END_TO_END_FACE_AUTHENTICATION_VALIDATION
sections.purpose: Validate complete admin and employee face auth lifecycle from enrollment through dashboard access
sections.completion_criteria: Full E2E face auth validated for both admin and employee flows

sections.name: ONE_TIME_EXECUTION_DIRECTIVE
sections.purpose: After all investigations/repairs/validations: perform one-time selective Fresh Installation Reset
sections.completion_criteria: Selective cleanup executed, platform restarted, bootstrap available

sections.name: FINAL_DELIVERABLES
sections.purpose: Generate all 24 final deliverable reports
sections.completion_criteria: All 30 deliverable documents generated and validated
